PROP-01b-partial1-inv-010.text: isValidSignature must enforce feeAmount == 0, kind == KIND_SELL, partiallyFillable == true.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-010.assertion: forall isValidSignature: order.feeAmount==0 AND order.kind==SELL AND order.partiallyFillable==true
